scoring_model.demand_weights: Attack Records(0.25) + Digitalization(0.20) + SME Revenue(0.15) + CAGR(0.15) - Cyber Readiness(0.20) + Industry Size(0.10) + SMB %(0.10) + Annual Loss(0.10)
scoring_model.outbound_weights: Reachability(0.35) + Buyer Clarity(0.20) - Procurement Friction(0.25) + Time to Value(0.10) + Vendor Sprawl(0.05) + Offer Fit(0.05)
scoring_model.final_formula: Priority Score = Demand Score x Outbound Score / 100

compliance.notes: PCI DSS, GDPR, cyber insurance renewals
